title: Muscle memory — procedural operator habits
motto: Repeated truth becomes reflex — Hostess 7 remembers what you do, not what you bookmark.
definition: Procedural memory for navigation, shortcuts, imports, and command sequences. Local-only; no cloud habit telemetry.

rooms.title: Muscle memory rooms — sealed understandings
rooms.motto: When a task is fully learned, Hostess 7 opens a room and locks the procedure inside.
